content:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant CLI as jet CLI
    participant Build as BuildPipeline
    participant CSS as CssPipeline
    participant Scanner as ContentScanner
    participant Emit as TailwindEmitter
    participant LCS as lightningcss
    participant FS as FileSystem

    CLI->>Build: jet build / jet dev
    Build->>CSS: process_css(entry: "index.css")
    CSS->>LCS: parse(source)
    LCS-->>CSS: AST

    CSS->>CSS: resolve_imports(AST)
    loop @import directives
        CSS->>FS: read imported file
        FS-->>CSS: file contents
        CSS->>LCS: parse(imported)
    end

    CSS->>CSS: detect_directives (@tailwind, @apply, @layer)

    alt has @tailwind directives
        CSS->>Scanner: scan_content(glob_patterns)
        Scanner->>FS: walk matching .ts/.tsx files
        FS-->>Scanner: file contents
        Scanner-->>CSS: used_classes: HashSet<String>

        CSS->>Emit: generate(used_classes, config)
        Emit-->>CSS: TailwindLayers {base, components, utilities}
        CSS->>CSS: inject layers at @tailwind positions
    end

    CSS->>CSS: expand @apply directives to CSS rules
    CSS->>CSS: route @layer custom rules

    CSS->>LCS: transform(nesting + vendor_prefixes)
    LCS-->>CSS: transformed CSS string

    alt production build
        CSS->>LCS: minify(transformed)
        LCS-->>CSS: minified CSS
    end

    CSS-->>Build: CssOutput { css, source_map, hash }
    Build->>FS: write dist/[name].[hash].css
```
